name: Standard Meeting Notes
description: General meeting notes focused on outcomes, decisions, action items, and follow-ups.

sections.title: Summary
sections.instruction: Provide a concise executive summary of the meeting, emphasizing outcomes and unresolved context.

sections.title: Decisions
sections.instruction: List concrete decisions made during the meeting. Include decision owner, rationale, and timestamp or transcript reference when available.

sections.title: Action Items
sections.instruction: List assigned tasks with owner, due date, priority, and timestamp or transcript reference. Use TBD when the owner or due date was not stated.

sections.title: Follow-ups
sections.instruction: List follow-up questions, pending confirmations, blocked decisions, and people or teams to re-engage after the meeting.

sections.title: Discussion Notes
sections.instruction: Summarize the main topics, tradeoffs, arguments, risks, and notable context that did not become a decision or action item.
